title: Soul Sword Mod
description: A powerful sword mod for forge 1.20.1. And a good tool for Harvesting SOULS..
body:
# NoN Wither Edition
When hit a mob thundering and lifesteal then the mob will get on fire...The password for the source code of this is (12345678R)
# Wither Edition
🗡️ Soul Sword: The Ultimate Protector
The Soul Sword is not just a weapon; it is a gateway to the spirit realm. Harness the power of fallen foes to defend yourself, summon legendary protectors, and break ancient curses.

✨ Features
👻 Soul Binding
Right-click any living entity with the Soul Sword to bind their spirit to the blade.

Your "Bound Minion" will be highlighted with a glowing aura.

They are persistent and will follow you through your journey.

Note: You can only have one soul bound at a time. Binding a new soul will release the old one.

⚡ Soul Consumption
To truly unlock the sword's power, you must make a sacrifice. Defeating your Bound Minion with the Soul Sword will charge the blade with raw energy.

Once charged, the sword will begin to Shine (Enchantment Glint).

You will receive a notification: "SOUL CONSUMED: Sword is Shining!"

🐉 Summon the Protector Wither
When your sword is charged, Right-click on a Dirt or Grass block to call forth a loyal Protector Wither.

Loyal AI: Unlike a normal Wither, this one is on your team. It will target hostile monsters and ignore you and your friends.

Life Span: The Protector stays for 5 minutes before vanishing back into the soul realm.

Safety First: The Wither is forced to ignore its owner every tick, ensuring no "accidental" targeting, but remember to run 20 blockes away when it spawn it kind of hate when you watch him.

💀 The Rainbow Curse
Think twice before attacking a Skeleton with this sword. Breaking the soul of the undead can trigger a Soul Curse:

You will be inflicted with the Wither effect.

7 Rainbow Skeletons will arrive to take revenge! Can you survive the prismatic onslaught?

🛠️ Technical Details
Base Damage: 102 (Sword Bonus + Base)

Attack Speed: 3.4 (Fast!)

Special Passive: Heals the user by 1.0 (0.5 hearts) on every successful hit.


📜 License & Permissions
Modpacks: You are free to include this mod in any modpack on Modrinth or CurseForge!

Reuse: This mod is Closed Source. You may not redistribute modified versions of the code without express permission.
